title: Adoption Programs Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger adoption programs foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Adoption Programs Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Adoption Programs Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good adoption programs foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Adoption Programs Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
